headline: TASK-071 is the live v6.6 frontier after 6.5.0.

current_state.operating_goal: Maintain v6.5.0 as the Execution Hygiene and Command Safety baseline, then use v6.6 to make AOF development Archmap-aware: every implementation-grade work item should update, defer, or explicitly mark architecture map impact as unaffected, with Mission Control rendering the current map ref, map-impact state, blockers, and runtime proof.
current_state.next_value_slice: After v6.5.0, advance v6.6 as Archmap-aware Mission Control: AOF should update or explicitly evaluate an Archmap architecture map as governed work progresses, while Mission Control projects map refs and map-impact state without becoming the source of truth.

primary_frontier_task.title: v6.6 frontier: Integrate Archmap into AOF governed development flow

visible_state.speech_bubble: I need council review before I should execute.
visible_state.next_action: Submit the gate packet to council review before actor execution.

why_now.summary: TASK-071 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
reasons: The active release baseline is 6.5.0 and the runtime is now targeting v6.6.
The current operating goal and next value slice both reinforce TASK-071 as the next bounded operating move.
